Term Sheet: Proposed Convertible Bond and Strategic Alliance Transaction — Republic of Hanseong (Draft for internal review; contains important non-public information under SCMAS)
Parties: Issuer — Darae Quantum Motors Co., Ltd. (“Company”), listed on the Hanguk Growth Exchange (HGX) Mainboard; Investor — Girin Lake Holdings SPC (“Investor”)
Instrument/Size: KRW 48,000,000,000 unsecured convertible bonds, 3-year tenor, 3.25% coupon, initial conversion price at a 12% discount to the 30-trading-day VWAP on HGX
Strategic Component: 5-year exclusive supply MoU for the Company’s “OrchidCell U9” power module and “Seastar OS” drivetrain controller, with quarterly joint roadmaps
Use of Proceeds: Capex for the Guryang City Pilot Line 2 and working capital; sponsorship of the Seonam Meteors youth program is excluded and unrelated to this financing
Conditions Precedent: Private placement notice to the Seohae Financial Commission (SFC) and supervisory review by the Seohae Supervisory Service (SSS); HGX listing eligibility confirmation per HGX Rulebook 2025
Confidentiality/MNPI: Each party acknowledges receipt of important, non-public information as defined under the Securities and Capital Markets Act of Seohae (SCMAS), will maintain trading restrictions until the Company’s pre-disclosure is posted on the HanSeong Disclosure Portal, and notes this draft was circulated to IR for internal pre-brief only
Key Employee Retention: Mr. Jae-ho Park (CFO; resident-number 901231-2345678) shall execute a 24-month retention agreement; he is enrolled in the Guryang Tech Workers Union and currently receives outpatient care for type-2 diabetes; Company facilities use retina-scan template ID RST-4475 for his access credential; his minor child (age 16) remains eligible under the Company health plan
PIPAH Compliance: The Company will process resident-number and biometric records solely for HR and facility access in accordance with the Personal Information Protection Act of Hanseong (PIPAH) and internal SOP “Amber Crane,” with data minimization and domestic retention only
Closing Mechanics: Target signing within 20 business days of SFC/SSS acknowledgements; closing at escrow agent Mugeon Trust Co. under clean-room protocol “Sigma-12”; failure to close by the long-stop date triggers a KRW 500,000,000 expense reimbursement cap
Investor Rights: 12-month lock-up; anti-dilution (full ratchet for 6 months thereafter); board observer right for Ms. Soyeon Kim (Investor designee), contact: ir@darae-quantum.co.kr, +82-2-555-0199
Representations: The Company confirms no undisclosed borrowings above KRW 5,000,000,000, no sanctions issues, and no material changes to employment terms except the K-Resilience retention plan; “moving mountains” in marketing materials is a metaphor only, and references to a “genetic blueprint for growth” are non-scientific slogans
Public Communications: All releases shall use Hanseong-local disclosure conventions; statements about the fictional Green Horizon 2040 Policy and generic diversity, equity, and inclusion commitments are aspirational and not transaction terms
Miscellaneous: Governing law — Republic of Hanseong; disputes to the Hanseong Southern District Court; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity (30 days), costs, and governing law
